final_prompt.prompt:
Create a promotional marketing poster for a 跨境电商 campaign with a visually complex but structured composition.

Style/medium: needs a bold, graphic-design-forward aesthetic with artistic typography and layered type stacking — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 horizontal layout; must include type-stacking layers with a product or hero subject physically overlapping and occluding portions of the background typography
Subject: must include a product or hero subject as the focal element that partially covers the stacked letterforms
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a high-energy promotional atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant, attention-grabbing direction suited for 跨境电商 promotions — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include artistic display lettering (艺术字); must include stacked / layered typography treatment; composition must feel visually rich and complex but remain organized and non-chaotic; product/subject must overlap at least some letterforms to create depth
Avoid: flat, sparse, or minimalist layouts; cluttered illegible chaos
